overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a highway overpass sidewalk on a sunny day. The character moves steadily forward past various vehicles including trucks and sports cars, with industrial buildings and billboards visible in the background.

events.description: traffic light changes to green, ego begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: starting from the crosswalk and walking past a black pickup truck at the intersection

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck accelerating through the intersection ahead of ego

entered.detail: weathered concrete sidewalk with red painted curb edge and cracks
traffic light pole with horizontal signal arms at the intersection
industrial smokestack emitting dark smoke against the sky
concrete highway overpass structure with multiple ascending lanes

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a highway intersection crosswalk with a black pickup truck moving ahead. The camera walks forward past the truck as the traffic light turns green, with an industrial smokestack visible in the distance and the highway overpass ramp ascending ahead.

events.description: large commercial truck with 'Good' branding passes by on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the inclined ramp of the highway overpass

notable_agents.action: large box truck with 'Good' logo and phone number driving uphill on the highway

entered.detail: rusted metal safety railing along the edge of the bridge sidewalk
large commercial billboard with advertisement facing the highway traffic

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the highway ramp with a metal railing now visible on the right. A large 'Good' truck passes by on the left, and a commercial billboard appears on the left side as the industrial smokestack fades from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway bridge midsection with moderate traffic

events.description: red convertible sports car with headlights on drives alongside the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge sidewalk with moderate traffic passing on the left

notable_agents.action: red classic convertible with headlights on driving parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: traffic light pole at the crest of the bridge ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the midsection of the highway bridge, a red convertible sports car passes by on the left. The traffic light at the crest of the bridge becomes visible ahead, while the previous billboard falls behind. The metal railing continues along the right side.

events.description: passing the traffic light pole at the crest of the bridge incline

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the traffic light at the crest of the bridge

entered.detail: second billboard structure visible further along the highway in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the crest of the bridge, passing the traffic light pole on the left. The red convertible has moved ahead, and traffic becomes sparser. A distant billboard becomes visible on the left as the bridge continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a busy highway intersection up to the crest of an overpass bridge under a bright sky. It begins at a crosswalk, moving forward past a black pickup truck as a traffic light turns green and an industrial smokestack looms in the distance. As the camera ascends the highway ramp, the smokestack fades from view and is replaced by a metal railing on the right and a large commercial billboard on the left. The scene then shifts to the midsection of the bridge, where a red convertible sports car speeds past before the camera approaches a traffic light at the bridge's peak. Finally, the camera passes the light pole as traffic thins, revealing a distant billboard on the left as the path continues forward.
